---
title: "Resume"
format: html
toc: true
---

# ASIF KACHROO

Los Angeles, California  
+1 (909) 569-7570 • [asifkachroo@hotmail.com](mailto:asifkachroo@hotmail.com)

---

## PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Highly motivated and detail-oriented IT Support Technician with hands-on experience supporting enterprise technology infrastructure across both laboratory and corporate environments. Demonstrated expertise in delivering comprehensive Tier 1, Tier 2, and Tier 3 technical support while maintaining exceptional service standards in fast-paced and highly regulated operational settings. Proven ability to troubleshoot, diagnose, and resolve complex hardware, software, networking, and endpoint management issues with precision, efficiency, and professionalism.

Experienced in supporting large-scale enterprise systems, managing endpoint deployments, maintaining identity and access management processes, and collaborating cross-functionally with technical and operational teams to ensure seamless day-to-day business continuity. Strong background working with Microsoft enterprise technologies, cloud identity platforms, endpoint management solutions, and networking infrastructure.

Recognized for maintaining composure under pressure, taking full ownership of technical incidents from initial diagnosis through successful resolution, and consistently delivering reliable, secure, and scalable support solutions. Possesses a strong passion for infrastructure technologies, cybersecurity operations, artificial intelligence-driven automation, and continuous professional growth within enterprise IT and security environments.

---

## PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

### IT Support Technician
**Veracyte, Inc.** — Full-Time  
*March 2025 – Present | San Diego, California, United States | On-site*

* Deliver comprehensive Tier 1, Tier 2, and Tier 3 technical support across laboratory and corporate environments, ensuring rapid resolution of hardware, software, operating system, network, and application-related incidents.
* Troubleshoot and resolve complex endpoint, infrastructure, and user-access issues while maintaining high service availability and minimizing operational downtime.
* Administer user identity and access management processes within Active Directory and Microsoft Entra ID environments, including onboarding, offboarding, account provisioning, permission management, and role-based access control enforcement.
* Configure, deploy, and maintain enterprise Windows endpoints through Microsoft Intune while ensuring device compliance, security policy enforcement, software deployment consistency, and adherence to organizational IT standards.
* Manage and support macOS enterprise environments using JAMF, including device provisioning, configuration profile deployment, endpoint compliance management, and lifecycle administration.
* Provide technical support for specialized laboratory-integrated systems and diagnostic workstations operating within highly sensitive and regulated healthcare technology environments.
* Assist in the maintenance and support of enterprise physical security infrastructure, including Verkada systems and associated monitoring technologies.
* Execute basic SQL queries to assist with backend troubleshooting, application support, data validation, and operational issue resolution.
* Collaborate with internal technical teams, engineers, and operational stakeholders to identify process inefficiencies and implement sustainable technical improvements.
* Contribute to the development and maintenance of standard operating procedures, technical documentation, troubleshooting guides, and workflow optimization initiatives.
* Support emerging artificial intelligence-driven automation projects designed to improve operational efficiency, streamline repetitive tasks, and enhance overall IT service delivery.
* Maintain a strong customer-focused approach while communicating technical concepts clearly and effectively to both technical and non-technical users.

### Technical Support Engineer
**Axelliant** — Contract  
*October 2023 – March 2025 | Torrance, California, United States | Hybrid*

* Supported enterprise infrastructure deployments and technical operations across multiple client environments, ensuring reliable implementation of networking and systems infrastructure.
* Performed rack-and-stack installations, server deployments, structured cabling, and server room buildouts in accordance with enterprise infrastructure standards and operational best practices.
* Assisted with the configuration and deployment of Cisco Meraki networking infrastructure, including VLAN configuration, trunk and access port assignments, uplink management, and switch stack organization.
* Participated in wireless infrastructure projects by conducting Ekahau wireless site surveys and supporting enterprise wireless optimization initiatives.
* Assisted with network upgrade projects, infrastructure migrations, and deployment activities designed to improve performance, scalability, and operational stability across client environments.
* Collaborated with senior engineers and project teams to troubleshoot networking issues, validate configurations, and ensure successful project execution.
* Maintained detailed asset tracking records, deployment documentation, infrastructure inventories, and implementation reports to support operational visibility and compliance.
* Delivered professional technical support while working in dynamic client-facing environments requiring strong communication, adaptability, and attention to detail.

---

## EDUCATION

### California State Polytechnic University, Pomona
**Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration**  
*Concentration: Computer Information Technology, Management & Operations*  
*Expected Graduation: 2026*

Relevant focus areas include enterprise systems, information technology operations, business process management, systems analysis, networking fundamentals, and technology-driven operational strategy.

---

## CERTIFICATIONS

* **Cisco Systems:** Certified Network Associate (CCNA)
* **CompTIA:** A+ Certification — In Progress

---

## TECHNICAL SKILLS

**Identity & Access Management:** Active Directory, Microsoft Entra ID (Azure Active Directory), User Provisioning & Access Control, Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)  
**Endpoint Management & Administration:** Microsoft Intune, JAMF, Windows Administration, macOS Administration, Endpoint Lifecycle Management, Device Compliance & Security Enforcement  
**Networking & Infrastructure:** Cisco Meraki, VLAN Configuration, Switching & Network Deployments, Structured Cabling, 802.1X Authentication, Wireless Infrastructure Support, Ekahau Wireless Site Surveys  
**IT Operations & Support:** Enterprise Technical Support, Incident Troubleshooting & Resolution, IT Asset Lifecycle Management, Freshservice Ticketing System, Technical Documentation, SOP Development  
**Security & Laboratory Technologies:** Verkada Security Infrastructure, Laboratory Systems Support, Diagnostic Workstation Support, Zebra Browser Print, Hamilton Liquid Handlers  
**Additional Technical Skills:** Basic SQL Querying, Backend Troubleshooting, Workflow Optimization, AI-Driven Automation Initiatives, Cross-Functional Technical Collaboration  

---

<div style="margin-top: 3rem; text-align: center;">
  <a href="assets/Asif Resume.pdf" class="btn btn-primary" target="_blank" style="font-size: 1.1rem; padding: 15px 40px !important;">Download Resume (PDF)</a>
</div>
